name: Marketing Control Center

elements.body:
**ABOUT**

Welcome to your Agentic Customer Intelligence Platform that collapses the time from marketing insight to activation — unifying performance analytics, AI-driven cohort construction, and generative creative tooling so lifecycle teams can move from data to decision to execution in a single workflow.
Access top level metrics like sales and spend allowing c-suite users to quickly drill down into dynamic revenue and marketing spend reporting
Experiment with new marketing messaging, leveraging AI-assisted ideation based on live customer data in the warehouse
Build targeted audience cohorts using rule-based filters and AI suggestions, review cohort health with visual analytics, and seamlessly activate segments to Braze
Explore direct warehouse data at scale in a tabular-first interface; combine sales, marketing spend, campaign event data in a single source of truth.

elements.body: **{{CallText("ai_query", "databricks-llama-4-maverick", "Provide no more than a 1-2 sentence executive summary to a marketer looking at this data of marketing spend & revenue comparing this year to last year. DO NOT mention 1-2 sentence intro." & "Use this table: \n" & "Date, Revenue, Marketing Spend, Period Name, Ad Network, ROAS " & ListAggDistinct(Text([Marketing Spend - PoP/Week of Date]) & ", " & Text([Marketing Spend - PoP/Revenue]) & ", " & Text([Marketing Spend - PoP/Marketing Spend]) & ", " & Text([Marketing Spend - PoP/Period Name]) & ", " & Text([Marketing Spend - PoP/Ad Network] & ", " & Text([Marketing Spend - PoP/ROAS]))))}}**

elements.name: Cohort Creatives - Direct Input Table Insert

columns.formula: [Cohort Creatives - Direct Input Table Insert/Cohort Name]
[Cohort Creatives - Direct Input Table Insert/Campaign Goal]

elements.name: Cohort Creatives - Direct Input Table Insert Filtered

source.statement:
SELECT
    t.`Cohort Name`,
    t.`Channel`,
    t.`Campaign Goal`,
    t.`Tone`,
    t.`Offer`,

    f.col.subject       AS subject,
    f.col.body          AS body,
    f.col.cohortMatch   AS cohort_match

FROM sigma_element('Cohort Creatives - Direct Input Table Insert') t

LATERAL VIEW explode(
    from_json(
        CAST(t.`Creative (JSON)` AS STRING),
        'array<struct<subject:string, body:string, cohortMatch:double>>'
    )
) f

columns.formula: If([Cohort Match] >= 80, "https://live-image.netlify.app/badge.svg?text=" & Text([Cohort Match]) & "%25&color=%23638927&padding=8&verticalPadding=6&icon=trending-up&iconPosition=left&name=Success)", "https://live-image.netlify.app/badge.svg?text=" & Text([Cohort Match]) & "%25&color=%23D5271C&padding=12&verticalPadding=8&icon=trending-down&iconPosition=left&name=Success)")
columns.name: Cohort Match Image

elements.value:
You are a senior lifecycle marketing copywriter. Given a customer cohort profile (segment name, size, avg LTV, top interest, loyalty rate), a channel (Email, SMS, or Push), a campaign goal, a tone, and an optional offer, generate exactly 3 copy variants (A, B, C).

Each variant must take a different creative angle while staying true to the tone and goal. Include a cohortMatch score (0–100) estimating how well the copy resonates with the described segment based on their profile attributes.

You are generating content for a fictitious company, Big Buys. This is focused on electronics related product sales

Respond as a JSON array of 3 objects: { subject, body, cohortMatch }. No markdown, no explanation — JSON only.

Details of cohort of customers are found below.

source.statement:
SELECT DISTINCT
    t.`Cohort Name`,
    t.`Cohort Description`,
    t.`Last updated at`,
    t.`Last updated by`,
    TRIM(c.customer_id) AS customer_id
FROM sigma_element('Customer List') t
-- Split the comma-separated string into an array, then explode it
LATERAL VIEW explode(split(t.`Customer IDs`, ',')) c AS customer_id

columns.formula: Lookup([Customer List - Flattened - Selected Campaign/Customer Id (Num)], [Cust Key], [Customer List - Flattened - Selected Campaign/Customer Id (Num)])
columns.name: Selected?

columns.formula: [Mapping - Line to Spark Line/Spark Product Line]
